description_long: This is a large, rectangular table with a dark brown wooden top and a sturdy black metal frame. The tabletop has a smooth, even surface with a subtle wood grain texture, giving it a refined yet robust appearance. The support structure consists of two wide, rectangular metal legs connected by a horizontal bar, providing stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The table's design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or attached seating. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for communal or public use, such as in parks, plazas, or outdoor dining areas. The materials and construction indicate durability and resistance to frequent use in urban environments.
description: A large, rectangular table with a dark wood top and black metal frame, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design. Ideal for communal or public urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the dark wooden tabletop and the black metal support frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, narrow profile of the tabletop and the rectangular metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and support frame from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the side profile with the same elongated tabletop and metal leg design.
